mapper.select: select approvalid, approvalname, seq, approverid, approvername from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovaluser order by approvalid, approverid
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piiapprovaluser (approvalid, approvalname, seq, approverid, approvername) values (#{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq}, #{approverid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvername, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into COTDL.tbl_piiapprovaluser (approvalid, approvalname, seq, approverid, approvername) values (#{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq}, #{approverid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvername, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select approvalid, approvalname, seq, approverid, approvername from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovaluser
order by approvalid , approverid limit #{offset}, #{amount}

select approvalid, approvalname from cotdl.tbl_piiapproval
order by approvalid
select approvalid, approvalname, seq, approverid, approvername from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovaluser where approvalid= #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by approvalid , approverid
select approvalid, approvalname, seq, stepname from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalstep where approvalid= #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by approvalid , seq
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalstep where approvalid like concat('%',upper(#{approvalid}),'%')
